title: simplify app label pipeline: remove TIER-APP-REVIEW-PR and TIER-APP-COMPLETE
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Trimming the pipeline
gist.blurb: We've simplified the app review pipeline by removing redundant labels and letting GitHub handle issue closing automatically. Less overhead, smoother sailing for maintainers.
gist.summary: Simplified the app review CI/CD pipeline by removing redundant labels and relying on branch name detection and GitHub's native auto-close features.
gist.impact: Maintainers have fewer labels to manage, and the automated app review process is more streamlined and less prone to workflow conflicts.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot cleaning up a factory conveyor belt, sweeping away excess colorful tags/labels to make the process smoother.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot sweeping away extra colorful pixelated tags from a glowing lime green (#ecf874) conveyor belt. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head gives a thumbs up. Soft pastel gradient background. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
